---
title: "TextLab in den Digital Humanities"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
  const deckUrl = "slides/textlab-ringvorlesung.html" + window.location.hash;
  window.location.replace(deckUrl);
</script>

<p>
  Weiter zu den
  <a href="slides/textlab-ringvorlesung.html">Folien: TextLab in den Digital Humanities</a>.
</p>
```
